description: Style NoteAdd a sophisticated polish to your minimalist look this season with this lucera ring. Styled to refine your ensemble, don't save it just for the special dates - wear this with your denim and tee staples too. Up the style bar with this trendy piece and style it with tonal accessories.   Product DetailsSlim silver band with a blue spherical central insetWhite and blue stones encrusted in the central insetMaterial and CareSilver, CZ diamondsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
